tables.title: General Concern-Raising Categories (Educational, Non-Diagnostic)
rows: Non-mobile infant reportedly 'rolled off' furniture and fractured a limb
Document objectively, continue care, report per policy
Different accounts from different caregivers or over time
Document each account exactly as given, report per policy
Significant injury with care sought well after expected
Document timeline discrepancy, continue care, report per policy
Pattern atypical for the reported mechanism
Document objectively, avoid speculative conclusions, report per policy
